_comment: Phase 0c conformance fixture — content_coming_soon_v1 extension. Item carries content_status='coming_soon' + release_at. Per spec: cover art + metadata visible; /media/play/:id returns 403 with release_at until release. Engine still cascades behavior + composes layers normally — the coming_soon state is informational at the schema layer (engine reads via item.content_status; renderer's playback attempt will 403 gracefully).
name: Coming Soon Conformance Fixture
